name: Successful Exchange ProxyShell Attack
description: Detects successful exploitation of the ProxyShell vulnerability against Microsoft Exchange servers, indicated by specific URL patterns and HTTP status codes.

prompts.prompt: CRITICAL ALERT: Successful ProxyShell exploitation detected against Microsoft Exchange server, indicated by specific URL patterns and HTTP status codes. This signifies a confirmed breach and potential system compromise. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Client IP** {c-ip}, **Client Method** {c-method}, **Client URI** {c-uri}, **Server Status Code** {sc-status}, **Client Username** {cs-username}, **Server Port** {s-port}. **Immediately isolate the affected Exchange server and initiate full incident response procedures.** This is a critical security breach.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the IIS log entry.

parameters.name: c-ip
parameters.description: The client IP address making the successful request.

parameters.name: c-method
parameters.description: The HTTP method used by the client (e.g., GET, POST).

parameters.name: c-uri
parameters.description: The URI requested by the client, containing the successful ProxyShell patterns.

parameters.name: sc-status
parameters.description: The HTTP status code returned by the server (200 or 301) indicating success.

parameters.name: cs-username
parameters.description: The username provided by the client, if any.

parameters.name: s-port
parameters.description: The server port that received the request.
